description: Schema and guardrails for Phase 6 full experiments. This file does not claim Phase 6 has started.

fixed_initial_sweep_order: Fix B=16 and layers=4; sweep d in [2,3,4].
Fix best d; sweep B in [8,16,32].
Fix structure; tune learning rate and dropout.
Add 3 seeds for final selected model.
guardrails: Do not report generated ListOps as official LRA.
Do not start scaling-law experiments before Phase 6 main tables and ablations exist.
Do not use the blockpair prototype as a final block-sparse kernel claim.
Every GPU run must record GPU id, utilization check policy, command, seed, and output directory.
